body: The change on deposit_route is not wanted. It's weird that these changes got picked up only now 🤔  we need to add a `{ nullable: false }` at the `user` field of ´CryptoRoute´ and re-run the migration
Is this correct? We cannot edit a migration after it's merged to DEV.
It's probably because your branch is not up to date with develop. You can either pull develop into your branch and redo the migration, or just remove all lines that are not related to your changes 😉
We do not use seed migrations
